pages.text: $(o)"No need to kill. No need to cage. Just... excise them from 'here'."$()$(br2)Pinnacle of the Void School. Painless and traceless — which is precisely what unsettles its readers.

pages.title: Effect
pages.text: Within $(l)24 blocks$():$(br)· All $(l)non-Boss$() hostiles are $(l)instantly killed$()$(br)· $(l)Bosses$() take $(l)30 void damage$() + Weakness III (10s)$(br2)Cost: $(l)5200$() mana.

pages.title: Tactics
pages.text: King of mob clearing — instant, no drops fight, no corpse mess.$(br2)Strong opener vs Bosses too: 30 void + Weakness softens follow-up.$(br2)Recommended: $(l)Tier 4 Dominion$() — only Dominion-tier mages were licensed to "exile" living things.
